lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the car performs as new.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows significant wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and driving as if it just left the dealership. Every detail has been meticulously maintained, making this a rare opportunity to own a flawless car that feels brand new.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a major restoration project. The exterior has significant cosmetic issues, including several rusted body panels, a peeling clear coat, and multiple large dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears, and the electronics, including the radio and power windows, are currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, showing signs of a significant oil leak and a failing transmission. It will require a trailer for transport as it is not currently roadworthy.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. It has been meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, dents, or stone chips. Inside, the leather is pristine, and all features function exactly as they did when it left the factory. This car truly looks and drives like new.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and displaying no discernible wear, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality and mechanical excellence.

Hey there! If you’ve been looking for your absolute dream ride, you’ve just found it! This beauty is in truly incredible shape and looks just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered since day one and is seriously spotless inside and out. You won't find a single scratch or dent on it—it's ready for its next adventure with you! Come take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed!

Available is an impeccably maintained E46 M3, representing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated inline-six engineering. Power is delivered via the legendary S54 power plant, featuring individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double-VANOS system. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe—addressing the platform's primary structural vulnerability—and a refreshed cooling system with a high-capacity aluminum radiator. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry is optimized with Bilstein PSS10 adjustable dampers, providing exceptional turn-in and lateral stability. The chassis remains rigid and free of oxidation, with all bushings replaced by high-durometer polyurethane equivalents. This is a turn-key, collector-grade specimen for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical perfection and linear power delivery.
Pristine condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect. Service records available. Inspection welcome.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector's dream. The exterior features a flawless, deep-gloss finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, appearing exactly as it did on the dealership floor. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and untouched, retaining its original factory scent and firm bolstering. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the precision climate control, functions flawlessly. This car has been meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service history, exclusively garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment, and has never seen rain or snow. It is a smoke-free, pet-free example that offers a genuine 'new car' experience for the discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, has been maintained with exacting standards. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled mechanical and aesthetic integrity, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to the exterior finish or the premium interior appointments. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a factory-new model, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for quality. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Hey there! Are you looking for a total showstopper? This car is an absolute dream and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one and is in truly mint condition—super clean inside and out. It drives incredibly smooth and is just waiting for someone new to enjoy it. You really have to see it in person to believe how perfect it is!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical purity. This example features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that has been fully overhauled for optimal valve timing. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a 3.62:1 limited-slip differential. The chassis has been proactively reinforced at the subframe mounting points, and the suspension geometry is sharpened by Bilstein PSS10 coilovers. With original paint depth throughout and a pristine cabin, this unit represents a turn-key opportunity for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Full service records. Mechanicals sound.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, the dashboard is flawless, and the interior still carries a fresh scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history from the original dealership and exceptionally low mileage. Every component, from the smooth-shifting transmission to the high-fidelity premium sound system, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare, collector-grade specimen for those who demand the absolute best in quality and preservation.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in truly pristine condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic imperfections and a flawless mechanical history. Every detail, from the factory-original finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a standard of care synonymous with collector-grade quality. An inspection will confirm that this vehicle remains in showroom-state condition, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, this specimen offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. Its flawless aesthetic and peerless mechanical integrity make it a premier choice for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm so excited to share this gorgeous ride with you. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, you’d swear it was brand new! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it truly shows. It’s super clean, runs perfectly, and is just waiting for someone to take it on a fun road trip. You’ve gotta see it in person to really appreciate how pristine it is!

This E92-generation M3 is a concours-level specimen featuring the legendary S65B40 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,400 RPM redline. This unit is equipped with a crisp 6-speed longitudinal manual transmission and the Variable M Differential Lock for precision torque distribution. The chassis remains structurally flawless with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing adaptive damping rates across all four corners. Meticulously maintained, the vehicle has undergone preventative rod bearing and throttle actuator services to ensure mechanical longevity. The factory-original paint retains full depth and luster, while the interior leather bolsters show zero compression, reflecting its true collector-grade status.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history included. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Tires replaced recently.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in showroom condition since its original purchase. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior still retains its factory-fresh scent, featuring supple, uncreased leather and pristine trim. Every mechanical component has been meticulously serviced on schedule at authorized dealerships, with a full paper trail included. It has been strictly garage-kept under a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. From the flawless alloy wheels to the spotless engine bay, this car presents as if it just rolled off the assembly line. It comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle exemplifies the highest standards of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the flawless coachwork to the pristine interior, has been maintained with exacting care. We invite you to experience a vehicle that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom state, offering unparalleled refinement and reliability.

We are pleased to present this peerless example, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting a level of preservation rarely seen on the market. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring an ownership experience that mirrors a showroom-fresh acquisition. For the discerning individual who accepts nothing less than the extraordinary, this investment-grade motorcar stands as a testament to automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she's a total gem! This car is in absolutely flawless condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’ve pampered this beauty, keeping it garage-stored and meticulously maintained. If you’re looking for that 'new car' feel without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! Come see it for yourself; you're going to fall in love!

Offered is a collector-grade 2011 BMW M3 (E92) in showroom condition. This example features the high-revving S65B40 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS with an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is managed by a lightning-quick 7-speed M-DCT and an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis retains its factory-spec rigidity, equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for precise damping adjustments. Meticulously maintained with zero mechanical deficiencies, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of atmospheric engineering and hydraulic steering feedback.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Original paint. Inspection ready.

Step into a vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This collector-grade example is presented in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled garage and pampered since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of swirls, chips, or blemishes, and protected by a ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the premium leather remains supple and taut, with no creasing or wear, and the dashboard and wood trim are flawless. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full, documented service history from authorized dealers with only genuine parts used. Every electronic feature, sensor, and mechanical system functions with factory precision. This is a rare find for a buyer who refuses to compromise on quality and seeks a vehicle in a pristine, showroom-original state. Includes all original manuals, keys, and a custom car cover.

We are pleased to present this investment-grade vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, showroom-quality interior, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically flawless and visually indistinguishable from new, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.
